description: Guardrail Fuzzer capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, adversarial corpus management, sanitizer probes, bypass reports, rule candidates, non-destructive CI gate / rule write-back / alert plans, Go native fuzz corpus planning, deterministic corpus manifest previews, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose adversarial guardrail fuzzing, bypass collection, rule-candidate planning, CI gate / rule write-back / alert planning, Go native fuzz corpus planning, deterministic corpus manifest previews, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded security console feature.
Keep guardrail fuzzer method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/guardrail-fuzzer only when the Guardrail Fuzzer pack is installed and enabled.
